title: FastPlace - Discontinued
description: A (discontinued) client-side fabric mod that lets you use right click functions faster by holding right click
body:
### _For the speedbuilders, the CPVPers, and generally the entire user-base of Minecraft, I present..._
# **FastPlace**!

## THIS IS A DISCONTINUED MOD!

It is a very powerful mod, which lets you use any right-click function much more easily. You can hold right click to spam placing/using blocks/items.


## Keybinds:
O: Opening FastPlace Extras Config\
G: Toggling FastPlace\
H: Toggling FastHit

## Warning:

You can use this mod to do quite a lot of clutches, **but remember:**

 **This mod may be considered cheating in some servers; make sure the server allows the mod before you use it.**  
 **USE AT YOUR OWN RISK!**

## To-Do List:
1. Make a toggle [√]
2. Make a way to customize specifically the item use delay. [√]
3. Finish making the new FastHit feature. [√]

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/E1E11KH01S)

Made by: Beadu  
I am not responsible for any actions this mod was used for, good or bad as they may be.
